mapper.select: SELECT /* BannerMapper.getBannerAllList */ A.BANN_SEQ , A.BANN_CTG , A.BANN_TYPE , A.BANN_NM , A.BANN_DESC , A.BANN_IMG , A.IMG_DESC , A.LINK_TARGET , A.LINK_URL_ADR , A.STAT_VAL , A.SNTY_PROD_SEQ , A.BANN_APD_DESC , A.MOBILE_BANN_IMG_NM , A.MOBILE_LINK_URL , A.SBSCRB_TYPE_CD , A.AGRM_TYPE_CD , A.CHRG_PLAN_CD , A.BG_COLOR , DECODE(A.INDC_ODRG, 0, 9999, A.INDC_ODRG) AS INDC_ODRG , A.INDC_ODRG AS indcOdrg , TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT , A.EVENT_TYPE , A.EVENT_START_DT , A.EVENT_END_DT , A.PSTNG_START_DATE , A.PSTNG_END_DATE , A.TEXT_COLOR1 , A.TEXT_COLOR2 , A.BANN_IMG_SEC , A.IMG_DESC_SEC , A.BG_COLOR_SEC , A.MOBILE_BANN_IMG_NM_SEC , A.PSTNG_START_DATE_SEC , A.PSTNG_END_DATE_SEC FROM NMCP_BANN_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' ORDER BY A.BANN_CTG, TO_NUMBER(DECODE(A.INDC_ODRG, 0, 9999, A.INDC_ODRG)), A.BANN_SEQ

SELECT /* BannerMapper.getBannerApdList */ B.BANN_SEQ , B.BANN_DTL_SEQ , B.IMG_NM , B.LINK_NM , B.SORT_ODRG , B.PSTNG_START_DATE , B.PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_BANN_BAS A, NMCP_BANN_BAS_APD B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BANN_SEQ = B.BANN_SEQ AND A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.BANN_CTG, A.INDC_ODRG, A.BANN_SEQ, B.SORT_ODRG
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_BANN_ACCESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_BANN_ACCESS_TXN( BANN_ACCESS_SEQ ,BANN_SEQ ,ACCESS_DATE ,ACCESS_TIME ,PLATFORM_CD ,BANN_CTG ,MENU_SEQ ,URL_SEQ ,REQ_TRT_CD ,USER_ID ,ACCESS_IP ) VALUES ( #{bannAccessSeqLong}, #{bannSeq}, to_char(SYSDATE,'yyyymmdd'), to_char(SYSDATE,'hh24miss'), #{platformCd}, #{bannCtg}, #{menuSeq}, #{urlSeq}, #{reqTrtCd}, #{userId}, #{accessIp} )
mapper.select: /* BannerMapper.getBannerTextList */ SELECT A.BANN_TXT_SEQ , B.TXT_DTL_SEQ , A.BANN_TXT_TYPE , A.BG_COLOR , A.USE_YN AS BANN_USE_YN , A.PSTNG_START_DATE AS BANN_PSTNG_START_DATE , A.PSTNG_END_DATE AS BANN_PSTNG_END_DATE , B.TXT_CONTENT , B.INDC_ODRG , B.USE_YN AS TXT_USE_YN , B.PSTNG_START_DATE AS TXT_PSTNG_START_DATE , B.PSTNG_END_DATE AS TXT_PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_BANN_TXT_BAS A , NMCP_BANN_TXT_DTL B WHERE A.BANN_TXT_SEQ = B.BANN_TXT_SEQ AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.BANN_TXT_TYPE, B.INDC_ODRG

/* BannerMapper.getBannerFloatList */ SELECT A.BANN_FLOAT_SEQ, B.NTCART_SEQ, A.BANN_FLOAT_NM, A.PSTNG_START_DATE, A.PSTNG_END_DATE, A.BANN_FLOAT_PC_IMG, A.BANN_FLOAT_MO_IMG, A.BANN_FLOAT_PC_URL, A.BANN_FLOAT_MO_URL, A.BANN_FLOAT_IMG_ALT, A.BANN_FLOAT_URL_TYPE FROM MCP_BANN_FLOAT A, MCP_BANN_FLOAT_REL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.BANN_FLOAT_SEQ = B.BANN_FLOAT_SEQ AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
